Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: Open-Source Article 12 Logging Infrastructure for the EU AI Act 24 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. The Xkcd thing, now interactive 960 upvotes, 135 comments
  3. Simplifying Application Architecture with Modular Design and MIM 21 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. Physics Girl: Super-Kamiokande – Imaging the sun by detecting neutrinos [video] 316 upvotes, 45 comments
  5. TorchLean: Formalizing Neural Networks in Lean 41 upvotes, 3 comments
  6. Show HN: Explain Curl Commands 16 upvotes, 0 comments
  7. A US Government iPhone-Hacking Toolkit Is Now in Foreign Spy and Criminal Hands 42 upvotes, 5 comments
  8. An Interactive Intro to CRDTs 24 upvotes, 2 comments
  9. The Two Kinds of Error 12 upvotes, 1 comments
  10. Disable Your SSH access accidentally with scp 73 upvotes, 24 comments
  11. Points on a ring: An interactive walkthrough of a popular math problem 38 upvotes, 10 comments
  12. Zen of AI Coding 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  13. Claude's Cycles [pdf] 333 upvotes, 157 comments
  14. Launch HN: Cekura (YC F24) – Testing and monitoring for voice and chat AI agents 48 upvotes, 16 comments
  15. Meta’s AI smart glasses and data privacy concerns 1342 upvotes, 752 comments
  16. I'm losing the SEO battle for my own open source project 357 upvotes, 190 comments
  17. Arm's Cortex X925: Reaching Desktop Performance 241 upvotes, 133 comments
  18. I'm reluctant to verify my identity or age for any online services 755 upvotes, 467 comments
  19. I Audited the Privacy of Popular Free Dev Tools, the Results Are Terrifying 33 upvotes, 12 comments
  20. GPT‑5.3 Instant 164 upvotes, 90 comments
  21. Intel's make-or-break 18A process node debuts for data center with 288-core Xeon 138 upvotes, 80 comments
  22. Fire the CEO, Introducing the AxO's 19 upvotes, 6 comments
  23. Why payment fees matter more than you think 45 upvotes, 22 comments
  24. GitHub Is Having Issues 134 upvotes, 89 comments
  25. Don't become an engineering manager 226 upvotes, 166 comments
  26. MacBook Pro with new M5 Pro and M5 Max 524 upvotes, 520 comments
  27. The beauty and terror of modding Windows 95 upvotes, 80 comments
  28. Iran War Cost Tracker 188 upvotes, 188 comments
  29. MacBook Air with M5 304 upvotes, 318 comments
  30. Apple Studio Display and Studio Display XDR 174 upvotes, 194 comments

Last generated 5:00am, 4 March 2026. Source here.
